name: t1548_005_suid
query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

name: t1548_005_proc_priv
query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

name: t1548_005_proc_hidden
query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;
